body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-8245", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-83", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Script in Attributes in a Web Page"}], "description": "Concrete CMS 9.5.0 and below is vulnerable to Reflected XSS in Legacy Pagination via HTML attribute injection. Concrete\\Core\\Legacy\\Pagination builds pagination links by raw-interpolating its $URL field into href=\"\" (<a href=\"{$linkURL}\" …>). Any authenticated admin or report viewer with access to `/dashboard/reports/forms/legacy` who clicks the crafted URL fires the payload in their session.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00139, "percentile": 0.03569}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f73j-pm2c-rxvr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-24T21:11:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f73j-pm2c-rxvr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f73j-pm2c-rxvr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8245"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T22:16:50Z", "published_at": "2026-05-22T00:31:17Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8245", "https://documentation.concretecms.org/9-x/developers/introduction/version-history/951-release-notes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f73j-pm2c-rxvr"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/concretecms/concretecms", "summary": "Concrete CMS is Vulnerable to Reflected XSS in Legacy Pagination", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-24T21:11:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f73j-pm2c-rxvr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.5.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "concrete5/concrete5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 9.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Concrete CMS is Vulnerable to Reflected XSS in Legacy Pagination
